title: DSDS Entity Metadata
description: Defines the metadata object accepted by all entity types. Metadata is a plain object keyed by field name. Each field's schema lives in its own file in this directory (status, since, last-updated, category, tags, aliases, summary, thumbnail, preview, extends, links). Every field is optional. Each may appear at most once, because objects cannot repeat keys. Fields with a single natural value are scalars or arrays directly ('since': '1.0.0', 'tags': [...]). status and lastUpdated take a string shorthand for the common case and an object form when more detail is needed. The entity's description is not metadata. It lives at the entity top level, beside `identifier` and `name`.

entityMetadata.description: Optional metadata for an entity, keyed by field name. Include only the fields that apply. Covers lifecycle (status, since, lastUpdated), classification and discovery (category, tags, aliases), compact display (summary, thumbnail, preview), inheritance (extends), and references (links).
